tasks.title: Create Xcode project with multi-platform targets (iOS, macOS)
tasks.notes: Single Xcode project with iOS and macOS targets sharing code. Use SwiftUI App lifecycle.

tasks.title: Set up Swift Package structure for modular architecture
tasks.notes: Create local SPM packages: CoreDomain, LibraryFeature, ReaderFeature, AnnotationFeature, PlaybackFeature, NotationFeature, SyncFeature, DeviceLinkFeature, SetlistFeature, InputTrackingFeature, DesignSystem.

tasks.title: Define CoreDomain data models (Score, ScoreAsset, SetList, Bookmark, etc.)
tasks.notes: SwiftData models for Score, ScoreAsset, AnnotationLayer, AnnotationStroke, AnnotationObject, SetList, SetListItem, Bookmark, JumpLink, PlaybackProfile, UserPreference, SyncRecord, ScoreFamily, RehearsalMark.

tasks.title: Create DesignSystem package with color tokens, typography, and shared components
tasks.notes: Premium visual language: dark/light themes, glass effects, typography-forward layout, custom iconography foundations.

tasks.title: Set up app entry point, tab navigation, and routing skeleton
tasks.notes: Main app with tab bar: Library, Setlists, Settings. Navigation stack per tab. Platform-adaptive layout (sidebar on macOS/iPad).

tasks.title: Add sample PDF scores to Resources/SampleScores for development testing
tasks.notes: Include 2-3 public domain PDF scores for testing import and rendering.

tasks.title: Build file import service (Files app, drag-and-drop, share extension)
tasks.notes: Import PDFs from Files app, iCloud Drive, drag-and-drop. Detect duplicates. Store in app container. Support bulk folder import.

tasks.title: Build library metadata editing UI (title, composer, tags, genre, etc.)
tasks.notes: Edit title, composer, arranger, genre, key, instrumentation, difficulty, duration, notes, custom tags. Auto-detect metadata from filename where possible.

tasks.title: Build Library Home screen with grid/list browsing and search
tasks.notes: Rich thumbnail grid, list view toggle. Search by title/composer/tag/text. Sort by recent, title, composer, genre, difficulty. Filter by collection/tag. Mark favorites.

tasks.title: Build Collections / Tags / Composers browser views
tasks.notes: Browse by category, collection, tag, composer. Assign scores to collections. Folder-like organization.

tasks.title: Build Score Detail page
tasks.notes: Show score metadata, thumbnail preview, attached assets, actions (open, edit metadata, add to setlist, delete). Premium layout.

tasks.title: Build high-performance PDF rendering engine for score reader
tasks.notes: Tiled rendering, page cache, prefetch adjacent pages. Support single-page, vertical scroll, horizontal paged views. Smooth zoom/pan at 120Hz. Do not rely solely on PDFKit if limiting.

tasks.title: Build Reader/Performance view with display modes
tasks.notes: Single-page, vertical scroll, horizontal paged, two-page spread on large displays. Cropped margin mode. Night/dark/sepia modes. High-contrast mode. Smart zoom presets. Per-score viewing preferences.

tasks.title: Build safe Performance Mode with accidental-touch prevention
tasks.notes: Strip all UI clutter. Large tap zones for page turn only. Prevent accidental actions. Lock orientation option.

tasks.title: Implement basic annotation toolbar (pen, pencil, highlighter, eraser, text, shapes)
tasks.notes: Freehand pen, pencil-style, highlighter, eraser, typed text, text boxes, shapes (circle, rect, underline, arrow). Apple Pencil support with palm rejection and pressure/tilt. Undo/redo. Autosave.

tasks.title: Build annotation persistence and overlay compositing
tasks.notes: Save annotations per document in SwiftData. Render annotation overlay on top of PDF pages. Continuous autosave.

tasks.title: Build Setlist module (create, reorder, manage set lists)
tasks.notes: Create set lists, drag-and-drop reorder, add/remove scores, create gigs/events/services. Link scores in sequence. Auto-open next score. Duplicate setlist.

tasks.title: Build Setlist builder UI and performance session flow
tasks.notes: Setlist view with ordered items. Tap to open score in reader. Navigate between setlist items. Performance notes per item. Pause timers between items.

tasks.title: Implement bookmarks and page navigation (jump to page, bookmarks panel)
tasks.notes: Add/remove bookmarks to pages. Bookmarks panel. Quick jump to page. Table of contents if available in PDF.

tasks.title: Implement basic CloudKit sync for library metadata and scores
tasks.notes: Sync Score metadata, setlists, bookmarks via CloudKit. Offline-first with background sync. Status indicators. Per-device download optimization.

tasks.title: Implement Bluetooth page-turn pedal support
tasks.notes: Detect and handle Bluetooth HID pedals. Map pedal buttons to page forward/back. Keyboard shortcut support for page turns.

tasks.title: Implement manual page-turn options (tap zones, swipe, half-page turn)
tasks.notes: Configurable tap zones (left/right/bottom). Swipe gestures. Half-page turn / smart turn modes. Apple Pencil gesture options.

tasks.title: Build Settings screen with preferences management
tasks.notes: App settings: default view mode, theme, page-turn behavior, pedal config, sync toggle, storage management.

tasks.title: Polish premium UI: animations, transitions, empty states, and overall visual refinement
tasks.notes: Micro-interactions, smooth transitions, premium empty states, elegant iconography. Ensure luxurious, restrained, modern Apple-native feel throughout.

tasks.title: Write wiki documentation for Phase 1 features in docs/
tasks.notes: Complete wiki pages covering library, reader, annotations, setlists, bookmarks, sync, page turning, and architecture decisions.

tasks.title: Implement annotation layers (teacher/performer/rehearsal layers)
tasks.notes: Multiple annotation layers per document. Named layers (teacher, performer, rehearsal). Hide/show layers instantly. Layer-specific colors.

tasks.title: Add stamps/symbols library (breath mark, bowing, fingering, cue, fermata, etc.)
tasks.notes: Stamps: breath mark, bowing, fingering, cue marker, cutoff, fermata reminder. Image stickers. Color-coded rehearsal markings.

tasks.title: Implement annotation version snapshots and restore points
tasks.notes: Version snapshots for annotation state. Restore to previous version. Undo/redo history preserved across sessions.

tasks.title: Build annotated PDF export (flatten or preserve editable)
tasks.notes: Export annotated PDF with options: flatten annotations, preserve as editable overlays. Raw annotation data backup export.

tasks.title: Implement CloudKit sync for annotations with conflict resolution
tasks.notes: Sync annotation layers and strokes via CloudKit. Conflict resolution strategy for concurrent edits. Explicit sync status indicators.

tasks.title: Build linked-device pairing via Multipeer Connectivity
tasks.notes: Peer-to-peer device discovery and pairing. Primary/secondary controller mode. Local network or Multipeer Connectivity.

tasks.title: Implement two-device page spread (left page + right page across devices)
tasks.notes: Extend one score across two devices. Left page on one, right page on other. Page-turn sync. Portrait/landscape negotiation.

tasks.title: Implement conductor/performer mirrored display mode
tasks.notes: Mirror score between conductor and performer devices. Annotation visibility options per device. Sync page position.

tasks.title: Write wiki documentation for Phase 2 features in docs/
tasks.notes: Document annotation layers, export, sync conflict resolution, linked devices, and two-device spread.

tasks.title: Build MusicXML parser and normalized score model
tasks.notes: Parse MusicXML/MXL files into internal normalized score representation. Extract measures, staves, parts, notes, dynamics, tempo markings, rehearsal marks.

tasks.title: Build MEI importer (convert MEI to internal score model)
tasks.notes: Parse MEI format and convert to same normalized internal model. Future-proofing for research-grade notation.

tasks.title: Build structured measure map and timing engine
tasks.notes: Generate measure map with timing from parsed notation. Support tempo changes, time signature changes, repeats. Map measures to playback positions.

tasks.title: Build audio playback engine (AVAudioEngine + soundfont/MIDI)
tasks.notes: Core MIDI + AVAudioEngine. High-quality sample playback or built-in soundfont engine. Instrument sound assignment per part.

tasks.title: Implement playback controls (play/pause, tempo, count-in, metronome)
tasks.notes: Play/pause, tempo slider, count-in, metronome overlay. Play from arbitrary measure. Gradual tempo increase mode.

tasks.title: Implement loop region and section looping (by measure, by rehearsal mark)
tasks.notes: Loop region playback. Per-measure looping. Section looping by rehearsal mark. Slow practice mode.

tasks.title: Build mixer panel (mute/solo staves, volume balance, instrument assignment)
tasks.notes: Mute/solo individual staves. Volume balance per part. Instrument sound assignment per part. Hands-separate/part-isolate mode.

tasks.title: Implement visual playhead/cursor with auto-scroll and note highlighting
tasks.notes: Visual playhead cursor through score. Staff/note highlighting. Follow playback with auto-scroll or auto-page-turn. Sync cursor to rendered pages.

tasks.title: Build rehearsal marks panel and playback navigation
tasks.notes: Rehearsal marks extracted from notation. Navigate to rehearsal mark. Play from rehearsal mark. Movement/section markers panel.

tasks.title: Implement transposition-aware playback
tasks.notes: Transpose playback where notation model supports it. Display transposition indicator.

tasks.title: Write wiki documentation for Phase 3 features in docs/
tasks.notes: Document MusicXML parsing, playback engine, mixer, looping, rehearsal navigation, and notation model architecture.

tasks.phase: Phase 4 — Motion / Head / Eye Page Turning
tasks.title: Build head movement tracking for page turns (Vision framework / ARKit)
tasks.notes: Front camera pose estimation using Vision framework or ARKit face tracking. Detect left/right head movement. On-device processing only.

tasks.phase: Phase 4 — Motion / Head / Eye Page Turning
tasks.title: Build eye gaze / gaze dwell page-turning
tasks.notes: Eye gaze detection for page-turn trigger. Dwell time configuration. Optional hold-to-confirm method.

tasks.phase: Phase 4 — Motion / Head / Eye Page Turning
tasks.title: Build calibration and training screen for motion-based turning
tasks.notes: Rehearsal calibration screen. Confidence threshold tuning. Sensitivity and debounce configuration. Preview/training mode. Left/right movement assignment.

tasks.phase: Phase 4 — Motion / Head / Eye Page Turning
tasks.title: Implement safety controls (debounce, confidence threshold, accessibility fallback)
tasks.notes: No accidental turns from casual movement. Strong privacy controls. Clear camera permission disclosures. Accessibility-safe fallback handling. Battery-efficient camera usage.

tasks.phase: Phase 4 — Motion / Head / Eye Page Turning
tasks.title: Write wiki documentation for Phase 4 features in docs/
tasks.notes: Document head/eye tracking implementation, calibration, privacy controls, and performance tuning.

tasks.title: Implement jump logic for navigation links (coda, DS, DC, repeats)
tasks.notes: Tappable navigation hotspots for coda/DS/DC/repeats. Manual link creation. Return behavior after jumps. Links from one score to another.

tasks.title: Build score family linking (full score + parts, alternate editions)
tasks.notes: Attach full score and parts as a score family. Switch between part and conductor score. Linked page references. Alternate editions for same work.

tasks.title: Implement cross-device Handoff and session continuity
tasks.notes: Handoff-like continuation between iPhone, iPad, Mac. Pick up where you left off. Transfer active setlist session. Sync current page and position.

tasks.title: Build MIDI keyboard input comparison (practice feedback)
tasks.notes: MIDI keyboard input detection. Compare played notes against score. Visual feedback for correct/incorrect notes. Foundation for score-following.

tasks.title: Research and prototype score-following (microphone/MIDI)
tasks.notes: Exploration path: pitch detection from microphone input. Align live performance with score position. Auto-page-turn from score following.

tasks.title: Write wiki documentation for Phase 5 features in docs/
tasks.notes: Document jump logic, score families, Handoff, MIDI practice, and score-following research.

tasks.title: Build onboarding flow and first-launch experience
tasks.notes: Premium onboarding screens. Import first score flow. Feature highlights. Quick setup wizard.

tasks.title: Implement trial/paywall and in-app purchase/subscription
tasks.notes: Free tier + Pro unlock. Optional subscription for cloud features. StoreKit 2 integration. Restore purchases. Trial gating.

tasks.title: Implement privacy-respecting analytics
tasks.notes: Minimal, privacy-first analytics. No unnecessary telemetry. Feature usage tracking for product decisions only.

tasks.title: Build VoiceOver and accessibility support
tasks.notes: VoiceOver support throughout. Large controls in performance mode. High contrast mode. Switch control compatibility. Configurable gesture/touch zones.

tasks.title: Build library backup/restore and migration tools
tasks.notes: Full library backup bundle export/import. Metadata backup. Set list export/share. Migration from other apps if feasible.

tasks.title: App Store optimization (screenshots, descriptions, keywords)
tasks.notes: App Store listing. Screenshots for all device sizes. Compelling description. Keyword optimization. Privacy nutrition labels.

tasks.title: Write wiki documentation for Phase 6 and final architecture overview in docs/
tasks.notes: Final documentation pass: onboarding, monetization, accessibility, App Store, and complete architecture wiki.
